name: Keerthana AI - Telegram Girlfriend Bot
description: Telegram AI girlfriend bot powered by Google Gemini with Tanglish conversation, referral system, and UPI payments.

MONGODB_URI.description: MongoDB connection string — get a free cluster at mongodb.com/atlas. Format: mongodb+srv://user:pass@cluster.mongodb.net/keerthana_bot

ADMIN_USER_ID.description: Your Telegram user ID — the admin who can run /adminhelp, /broadcast, /block, etc. Get your ID from @userinfobot

FORCE_SUB_CHANNEL.description: Optional: Force users to join a channel before chatting. Set to @yourchannel (bot must be admin there). Can also be set at runtime via /setforcesub.

GEMINI_API_KEY.description: Primary Google Gemini API key — get free at aistudio.google.com

GEMINI_API_KEY_1.description: Optional: 2nd Gemini key for rotation (higher quota)

HEROKU_APP_NAME.description: Your Heroku app name exactly as shown in the URL (e.g. my-app-name). Used to auto-register the Telegram webhook.

DASHBOARD_PASSWORD.description: Password to access the admin dashboard at /dashboard

SESSION_SECRET.description: Random secret for Flask session encryption

PAYTM_MERCHANT_ID.description: Paytm Merchant ID (MID) — required with PAYTM_MERCHANT_KEY to enable auto-payment verification. Find it in your Paytm Business dashboard.

PAYTM_MERCHANT_KEY.description: Paytm Merchant Key — required with PAYTM_MERCHANT_ID. Both must be set together for Paytm v3 API auto-verification to work.

PAYTM_UPI_ID.description: Your Paytm UPI VPA where users send payments (e.g. yourname@paytm). Required for QR code generation.
